attacking_style: Explosive accelerations in final 200-500m of steep uphill finishes, particularly effective on gradient changes and hairpins. Signature move at 1km banner on Monuments, sitting on wheels until late launch.
team_tactics: Movistar sets tempo on climbs to isolate him in select groups; benefits enormously from undivided leadership (Catalunya 2017) but weakens when co-leading with Quintana. Domestiques sacrifice with surges in final 3km.
terrain_preference: Steep explosive finishes (Mur de Huy specialist with 5 wins), uphill sprints after prolonged climbs, gravel positioning over power. Vulnerable on sustained steep gradients and in multi-rider tactical finales where sprint timing alone insufficient.
vulnerability: Declining power on steepest gradients after age 40; drops initially on sustained climbs then claws back. Poor tactical judgment in sprint rotations (LBL 2021 taking front too early). Loses explosive punch in high-altitude finishes.
key_patterns: Wins from 200-500m explosive sprint after sitting on wheels; refuses pulls until finale (Catalunya stage wins)
Contests time bonuses opportunistically even in domestique role or irrelevant GC gaps, revealing competitive ego
Exceptional longevity: competitive uphill sprint at 41, career-best Strade result at 41 via positioning intelligence
Monument consistency: decade-long top-10 finishes, four LBL wins attacking inside final kilometer
Vulnerable on first steep accelerations then recovers; requires pacing support when initially dropped on mountains
Tactical maturity peaks late-career: faked weakness at 500m then won (Vuelta 2019), calculated tempo over attacking
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 retirement year showed declining explosive power (couldn't hold Fleche hairpins despite positioning), though experience still delivered Strade podium and Lombardia top-10. Age finally limiting climbing margins.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7
